capabilities.title: What works without a key
capabilities.subtitle: Core features work offline — a free API key just unlocks more discovery.
capabilities.free: Signing & sending transactions, WalletConnect, Swap (KyberSwap / OpenOcean), USD prices, DeFi staking positions, cross-chain aggregation, approval risk scoring, basic assets (native coins + common tokens), and all Avalanche data (tokens, NFTs, history).
capabilities.alchemyHeading: Add a free Alchemy key to unlock
capabilities.alchemy: Full token discovery, NFT gallery and transaction history on Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism and Base, plus Token Approvals scanning.
capabilities.nodereal: Full BEP-20 token list on BNB Chain (native BNB shows without a key).

onboarding.welcomeBody: ArcSign is a secure multi-chain HD wallet that stores your private keys exclusively on USB drives. No cloud servers, no internet exposure — your keys never leave your hardware.
onboarding.welcomeHighlight: Your keys. Your USB. Your control.
onboarding.securityBody: ArcSign keeps your cryptographic keys physically isolated from online threats.
onboarding.securityPoint1Body: Private keys are generated and stored on your USB drive, encrypted with AES-256-GCM.
onboarding.securityPoint2Body: Master password protects app config. Individual wallet passwords encrypt each wallet's keys separately.
onboarding.securityPoint3Body: Remove the USB drive and your keys are completely air-gapped from any online threat.
onboarding.featuresBody: Everything you need for secure multi-chain asset management.
onboarding.feature1Body: Bitcoin + 21 EVM chains including Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, and more.
onboarding.feature2Body: One mnemonic phrase generates addresses for all supported chains.
onboarding.feature3Body: Connect to dApps securely from your desktop.
onboarding.feature4Body: Built-in DEX aggregation via OpenOcean & KyberSwap for instant token exchanges.
onboarding.feature5Body: Sign Hardhat and Foundry transactions without exposing private keys.
onboarding.practicesBody: Follow these guidelines to keep your assets safe.
onboarding.practice1Title: Back up your encrypted wallet files
onboarding.practice1Body: Regularly copy the encrypted files from your USB to a second secure USB or offline storage. ArcSign's dual encryption is stronger than writing down a mnemonic on paper.
onboarding.practice2Body: Use unique, strong passwords for both your master password and each wallet password.
onboarding.practice3Body: ArcSign will never ask for your mnemonic or private keys. No legitimate service will either.
onboarding.practice4Body: Treat your USB drive like a physical vault. Consider keeping a backup in a separate location.
onboarding.practice5Body: ArcSign auto-locks after 15 minutes of inactivity. This is a security feature, not a bug.
onboarding.apiKeyBody: ArcSign needs API keys to query blockchain data (balances, gas fees, transactions). Free plans are sufficient.
onboarding.apiKeyAlchemyDesc: Query token balances, gas fees, and broadcast transactions
onboarding.apiKeyAlchemyChains: Supports: Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base
onboarding.apiKeyNoderealDesc: Query token balances, gas fees, and broadcast transactions
onboarding.apiKeySkipHint: You can set up API keys later in Settings > API Provider Settings.
onboarding.apiKeyNoKeysWarning: Without API keys, balance queries and transactions won't work.
onboarding.readyBody: You're ready to create your first wallet and start managing your digital assets securely.
onboarding.revisitHint: You can revisit this guide anytime from Settings.
